name: Where art thou, fair maiden?
author: Mav
bootlegger: All outsiders are Damsels. X number of Damsels are added to the bag, where X is the number of minions.

The Damsels know who each other are & each night (at the damsel stage in the night order), sober living damsels gather to decide who amongst the living Damsels is the True Damsel. They are also told X-1 Townsfolk roles not in play.

During the day, each minion can make a guess as to who might be the True Damsel. If they guess a regular Damsel, that Damsel dies and the minion can make another guess. The evil team wins if they correctly guess the True Damsel.
If a minion is holding lil' monsta, they cannot make a damsel guess & a dead minion loses the ability to make a Damsel guess.
